channel.title: Home on SparkMedia.ai
channel.description: Recent content in Home on SparkMedia.ai

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Our Mission

At SparkMedia.ai, we have one simple mission: Help local service businesses turn high intent Google searches into booked customers.

We started with a focus on plumbing businesses because we saw a gap in the market. Most digital marketing agencies treat all businesses the same, but plumbing has unique challenges and opportunities that require specialized expertise.

Why We Focus on Plumbing

Plumbing businesses face specific challenges in digital marketing:

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Let’s Talk About Growing Your Plumbing Business

Whether you’re ready to get started, have questions about our services, or want to schedule your free audit, we’re here to help.

Contact Information

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem; background-color: var(--light); border-radius: 10px;">
    <div style="font-size: 2rem; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 1rem;">📱</div>
    <h3 style="color: var(--accent);">Phone</h3>
    <p><a href="tel:5551234567">(555) 123-4567</a></p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--accent);">Mon-Fri, 9am-5pm EST</p>
</div>

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem; background-color: var(--light); border-radius: 10px;">
    <div style="font-size: 2rem; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 1rem;">📍</div>
    <h3 style="color: var(--accent);">Office</h3>
    <p>123 Marketing Ave<br>Suite 100<br>Digital City, DC 12345</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--accent);">By appointment only</p>
</div>

Send Us a Message

    <div>
        <label for="email" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">Email *</label>
        <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required style="width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;">
    </div>
    
    <div>
        <label for="phone" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">Phone</label>
        <input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" style="width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;">
    </div>
    
    <div>
        <label for="business" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">Business Name *</label>
        <input type="text" id="business" name="business" required style="width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;">
    </div>
    
    <div>
        <label for="service" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">Primary Service</label>
        <select id="service" name="service" style="width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;">
            <option value="">Select a service...</option>
            <option value="residential">Residential Plumbing</option>
            <option value="commercial">Commercial Plumbing</option>
            <option value="emergency">Emergency Plumbing</option>
            <option value="drain">Drain Cleaning</option>
            <option value="water-heater">Water Heater Services</option>
            <option value="sewer">Sewer Line Services</option>
            <option value="other">Other</option>
        </select>
    </div>
    
    <div>
        <label for="message" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">Message *</label>
        <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="5" required style="width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;"></textarea>
    </div>
    
    <div>
        <label style="display: flex; align-items: start; gap: 0.5rem;">
            <input type="checkbox" id="audit" name="audit" style="margin-top: 0.25rem;">
            <span>I'd like to schedule a free Google Ads audit</span>
        </label>
    </div>
    
    <div style="text-align: center;">
        <button type="submit" class="btn" style="width: 100%; max-width: 300px;">Send Message</button>
    </div>
</form>

<div id="formMessage" style="display: none; text-align: center; padding: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; border-radius: 5px;"></div>

{{ partial "contact-form.html" . }}

What Happens Next

  1. Initial Response: We’ll acknowledge your message within 24 hours
  2. Information Gathering: We may ask a few follow-up questions about your business
  3. Consultation Scheduling: We’ll schedule a call to discuss your needs in detail
  4. Custom Proposal: If appropriate, we’ll prepare a customized strategy for your business

Best Ways to Reach Us

For urgent inquiries: Call us at (555) 123-4567 For audit requests: Use the Free Audit page For general questions: Email hello@sparkmedia.ai For existing clients: Contact your dedicated account manager

item.title: Free Audit
item.description:
Free 30-Minute Google Ads & SEO Audit for Plumbing Businesses

Discover exactly how your plumbing business is performing on Google and identify opportunities to get more high-quality leads.

What’s Included in Your Free Audit

1. Google Ads Performance Analysis

  • Campaign structure review
  • Keyword targeting assessment
  • Ad copy effectiveness
  • Landing page conversion rates
  • Cost-per-lead analysis
  • Competitor benchmarking

2. Local SEO Health Check

  • Google Business Profile optimization score
  • Local search ranking analysis
  • Citation consistency audit
  • Review presence assessment
  • Mobile optimization check

3. Website Conversion Audit

  • Lead capture form analysis
  • Call-to-action effectiveness
  • Page load speed assessment
  • Mobile responsiveness check
  • Trust signal evaluation

How It Works

  1. Schedule Your Audit - Book a 30-minute slot below
  2. Share Access - Provide temporary access to your Google Ads account and website analytics
  3. Receive Analysis - We’ll prepare a detailed audit before our call
  4. Strategy Session - 30-minute video call to review findings and discuss next steps

What You’ll Receive

  • PDF Audit Report with specific findings and recommendations
  • Competitive Analysis showing how you stack up against local competitors
  • Quick Win Opportunities that can be implemented immediately
  • Customized Strategy for improving your Google presence
  • No Obligation - This is a free consultation with no strings attached

Schedule Your Free Audit

<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
    <div style="background: var(--white); padding: 1rem; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center;">
        <div style="font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary);">Monday - Friday</div>
        <div>9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST</div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="background: var(--white); padding: 1rem; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center;">
        <div style="font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary);">Video Call</div>
        <div>Google Meet or Zoom</div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="background: var(--white); padding: 1rem; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center;">
        <div style="font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary);">Preparation</div>
        <div>15 minutes required</div>
    </div>
</div>

<div style="text-align: center;">
    <a href="mailto:hello@sparkmedia.ai?subject=Free%20Google%20Ads%20Audit%20Request&body=Hi%20SparkMedia.ai%20team,%0A%0AI'd%20like%20to%20schedule%20a%20free%2030-minute%20audit%20of%20my%20plumbing%20business%20Google%20Ads%20and%20SEO%20performance.%0A%0APlease%20send%20available%20times.%0A%0ABusiness%20Name:%0AWebsite:%0ACurrent%20Monthly%20Ad%20Spend:%0A%0AThank you!" class="btn">Email to Schedule</a>
    <p style="margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--accent);">Or call us at (555) 123-4567</p>
</div>

Who This Audit Is For

  • Plumbing business owners spending $1,000+/month on Google Ads
  • Marketing managers at plumbing companies looking to improve ROI
  • Businesses not getting enough qualified leads from Google
  • Companies wanting to understand their competitive position
  • Businesses considering hiring a Google Ads management agency

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is this really free? A: Yes, absolutely. This is a no-obligation consultation to help you understand your current performance and opportunities.

item.title: Services
item.description:
Specialized Google Ads Management for Plumbing Companies

At SparkMedia.ai, we focus exclusively on helping plumbing businesses dominate Google search results. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities in the plumbing industry, from emergency services to routine maintenance.

Our Core Services

1. Strategic Google Ads Campaigns

  • Emergency Plumbing Keywords: Target customers searching for “emergency plumber near me”, “burst pipe repair”, “water leak emergency”
  • Service-Specific Campaigns: Drain cleaning, water heater installation/repair, toilet repair, sewer line services
  • Geographic Targeting: Focus on your service areas with radius targeting and location extensions
  • Call Tracking & Optimization: Track which keywords lead to phone calls and optimize accordingly

2. Local SEO Optimization

  • Google Business Profile Management: Complete optimization of your GBP listing
  • Local Citation Building: Ensure consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) across directories
  • Localized Content Creation: Service area pages and location-specific content
  • Review Management: Strategies to generate and respond to customer reviews

3. Conversion Rate Optimization

  • High-Converting Landing Pages: Mobile-optimized pages designed for plumbing leads
  • Call-to-Action Optimization: Clear paths to contact, quote requests, and emergency calls
  • Form Optimization: Reduce friction in lead capture forms
  • Trust Signals: Licenses, certifications, and customer testimonials

4. Performance Analytics & Reporting

  • Transparent Dashboard: Real-time access to campaign performance
  • Monthly Strategy Reviews: Deep dive into what’s working and optimization opportunities
  • ROI Tracking: Clear measurement of advertising spend to booked jobs
  • Competitive Analysis: Monitor competitor positioning and adjust strategy

Why Choose SparkMedia.ai for Your Plumbing Business?

Industry Expertise: We understand plumbing-specific search behavior and customer intent Proven Results: Average 3-5x ROI increase for our plumbing clients Transparent Pricing: No hidden fees, clear monthly management fees Dedicated Account Manager: Single point of contact who understands your business 24/7 Campaign Monitoring: We watch your campaigns around the clock
